title: Wolf Variants
description: Brings the wolf variants from 1.20.5 snapshots to 1.20.
body:
Brings the wolf variants added in snapshot 24w10a to more game versions. Tested on 1.20.4, but should work with most game versions.

Requires [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) or [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads).
